types.notes: Concurrent access requires thread-safe reference counting

ownership.rationale: Thread-safe access to shared state requires locking
Rust uses Box for heap allocation

error_paths.rust: Result<T, E> where E = Box<dyn Error>>
Result<T, E> where E = Box<dyn Error>>
Result<T, E> where E = Box<dyn Error>>

functions.name: init
pre: flightsYaml and faresYaml are valid file paths
post: initialized_ is set to true if successful
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of routes

functions.name: loadData
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of flights and fares

functions.name: getAvailableRoutes
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of routes

functions.name: getDatasetSummary
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of routes

functions.name: reloadData
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of routes

functions.name: updateFares
post: Updates fares for given route and date
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of fares

functions.name: loadFlightsFromYaml
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of flights

functions.name: loadFaresFromYaml
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of fares

functions.name: parseFlightsFromRoute
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of flights

functions.name: parseFaresFromRoute
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of fares

functions.name: filterFlights
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of flights

functions.name: filterFares
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of fares

functions.name: validateDataConsistency
functions.complexity: O(n^2) where n is number of routes

invariants: After initialization, routes_ must contain valid data
loadCount_ must be incremented on each loadData call
fares and flights must have matching carriers

concurrency.thread_safety: Implementation uses Arc<Mutex<>> for thread-safe access to shared state

raw_spec:
types:
  - cpp: "std::map<std::string, YamlDataLoader::RouteData>"
    rust: "std::sync::Arc<std::collections::HashMap<String, RouteData>>"
    ownership: "Arc"
    notes: "Concurrent access requires thread-safe reference counting"

  - cpp: "bool"
    rust: "bool"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Primitive type remains same"

  - cpp: "int"
    rust: "i32"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Primitive type remains same"

  - cpp: "std::string"
    rust: "String"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "String type remains same"

  - cpp: "std::vector<std::string>"
    rust: "Vec<String>"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Vector type remains same"

  - cpp: "Flight"
    rust: "Flight"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Struct type remains same"

  - cpp: "Fare"
    rust: "Fare"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Struct type remains same"

  - cpp: "LogicalEntity"
    rust: "LogicalEntity"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Struct type remains same"

ownership:
  - cpp_pattern: "Static variables (routes_, initialized_, etc)"
    rust_pattern: "Arc<Mutex<>>"
    rationale: "Thread-safe access to shared state requires locking"

  - cpp_pattern: "Heap allocated objects"
    rust_pattern: "Box<T>"
    rationale: "Rust uses Box for heap allocation"

  - cpp_pattern: "References (&)"
    rust_pattern: "&"
    rationale: "Rust uses references for borrowing"

error_paths:
  - source: "YAML parsing errors"
    recovery: "Return false"
    rust: "Result<T, E> where E = Box<dyn Error>>"

  - source: "File I/O errors"
    recovery: "Return false"
    rust: "Result<T, E> where E = Box<dyn Error>>"

  - source: "Data validation errors"
    recovery: "Return false"
    rust: "Result<T, E> where E = Box<dyn Error>>"

functions:
  - name: "init"
    pre: ["flightsYaml and faresYaml are valid file paths"]
    post: ["initialized_ is set to true if successful"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies static variables"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of routes"

  - name: "loadData"
    pre: ["initialized_ must be true"]
    post: ["Returns LogicalEntity with filtered data"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies loadCount_"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of flights and fares"

  - name: "isInitialized"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns current initialization state"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "getLoadCount"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns current load count"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "resetLoadCount"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Resets load count to 0"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies loadCount_"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

  - name: "getAvailableRoutes"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns vector of route keys"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of routes"

  - name: "getDatasetSummary"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns string summary of dataset"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of routes"

  - name: "reloadData"
    pre: ["flightsFilePath_ and faresFilePath_ are set"]
    post: ["Reloads data from YAML files"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies static variables"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of routes"

  - name: "updateFares"
    pre: ["initialized_ must be true"]
    post: ["Updates fares for given route and date"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies routes_"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of fares"

  - name: "loadFlightsFromYaml"
    pre: ["filename is valid"]
    post: ["Loads flights from YAML file"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies routes_"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of flights"

  - name: "loadFaresFromYaml"
    pre: ["filename is valid"]
    post: ["Loads fares from YAML file"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies routes_"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of fares"

  - name: "parseFlightsFromRoute"
    pre: ["routeNode contains valid data"]
    post: ["Parses flights from route node"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies routes_"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of flights"

  - name: "parseFaresFromRoute"
    pre: ["routeNode contains valid data"]
    post: ["Parses fares from route node"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies routes_"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of fares"

  - name: "filterFlights"
    pre: ["SearchRequest is valid"]
    post: ["Returns filtered flights"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of flights"

  - name: "filterFares"
    pre: ["SearchRequest is valid"]
    post: ["Returns filtered fares"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of fares"

  - name: "validateDataConsistency"
    pre: ["routes_ contains loaded data"]
    post: ["Validates dataset consistency"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n^2) where n is number of routes"

  - name: "makeRouteKey"
    pre: ["origin and destination are valid"]
    post: ["Returns route key string"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

invariants:
  - "After initialization, routes_ must contain valid data"
  - "loadCount_ must be incremented on each loadData call"
  - "fares and flights must have matching carriers"

concurrency:
  thread_safety: "Implementation uses Arc<Mutex<>> for thread-safe access to shared state"
  shared_state: ["routes_", "initialized_", "loadCount_", "flightsFilePath_", "faresFilePath_"]

dependencies:
  - "serde_yaml for YAML parsing"
  - "log for logging"
  - "chrono for timing"
